meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: NEKO MAKER: Catgirl Raising Story
items.short_description: 她六岁来到你身边。十二年后，她会成为什么样的人——取决于你的每一个选择。15种结局，61个事件，一封只属于你们的信。

items.title: LIMBY
items.short_description: LIMBY is a twisted puzzle platformer. Play as Limby, a frat bro turned zombie. Traverse through 30 absurd and brain scrambling levels. Use your severed limbs to reach new heights and unlock new pathways to achieve your ultimate goal: Devour. The. Nerd.

items.title: Tank 99
items.short_description: 玩家控制坦克，穿梭在各种地形中，保护基地不被击破，同时击溃所有敌军坦克，获得胜利

items.title: The Miki Komori Project
items.short_description: Before the streams and before anyone knew her name, there was only Miki. Explore the hidden origins of TheMikiKomori in an atmospheric visual novel about loneliness, identity, and the strange mysteries pulling her toward an uncertain future beneath the digital sea.

items.title: 东北往事
items.short_description: 本作深度改编自著名国民级IP《东北往事之黑道风云20年》。故事始于上世纪80、90年代东北暗流汹涌的街头，旧秩序正在改变。你，赵红兵，被卷入兄弟义气与地盘争夺的漩涡。与此同时，清纯如雪的高欢、泼辣似火的毛琴等红颜相继闯入你的生命；而情感的交织与江湖的算计接连上演。在权力与欲望面前，你的选择将彻底改写自己与他人的命运，走出独属于你自己的“道”

items.title: UnfAIr War: Survivors
items.short_description: This is NOT a "forever" roguelike for thousands of hours. It's a game for a few cozy evenings. Download — launch — play immediately. No skill trees, no boring meta-grind. Just pure co-op action: you're chained together, dodging waves of robots, throwing grenades, and triggering ultimates.

items.title: Frog Climb
items.short_description: 🐸Free-To-Play🐸 Stop following someone else's route. Create your own way to the top by building your own path 🐸 Frog Climb is a stylized co-op climbing adventure where you must escape from terrariums 🐸 Level up, gain powerful upgrades, and prove that no wall is too high for a frog with a plan 🐸

items.title: Gin - The Silver Wind
items.short_description: Become a Kamaitachi in this methodical 2D platformer. You can't change direction in mid-air. Use your double jump to anticipate your landing and maneuver through the air with the use of a powerful Tornado move. Master the movement and challenge yourself to overcome the tough battles ahead!

items.title: Operation: Black Genesis - The Immortal Trials
items.short_description: top-down co-op survival horror game where players deploy into deadly Quarantined Zones, fight mutated experiments, and extract with everything you can carry—because if you die, you lose it all.

items.title: Horde Beyond
items.short_description: Master full fast-paced tactical space combat with dynamic missions, coordinated enemy squadrons, and deep ship upgrades. Fight through hostile space in with battlefield hazards, adaptive enemy tactics, alone or in co-op or bots with up to 4 players.

items.title: 電影大戦
items.short_description: Time is your penalty! No lives—getting hit drains your clock. Slay enemies and harvest energy before time runs out! "Strike first, strike fast!" Shatter shields and unleash massive counter lasers with a Perfect Parry! "Den-ei Taisen" evolves every play. Pick 1 of 3 skills. High-speed roguelite!

items.title: 机动战线
items.short_description: 这是一款极具特色的机甲对抗游戏，多人多抗，最低为1V1玩家对抗，以攻击敌方主基地，击垮敌方战力条为主，快速推进进行移动距离，你可以使用任何武器进行战斗，比如优秀的FA光速步枪，或者是蓄力光速枪进行反击，毅或者选择使用火箭筒进行打鸟，或者选择光速军刀进行机甲格斗战，无论哪一种相信你会非常容易上手，在战场中，你还可以通过丢弃武器或者拾取武器改变作战形式，这款游戏的上手程度非常容易，在精神上能找回你曾经的感觉，相信你一定会喜欢这款游戏

items.title: Digital Anima: Virtual Lifeform Care Kit
items.short_description: Digital Anima: Electronic Life Form Raising Kit is a psychological desktop invasion horror game where you raise a virtual pet on your own computer. Raise a Digima inside a tiny window on your desktop and watch the conspiracy behind its evolution and the truth about its developer slowly unravel.

items.title: Granny's Rampage
items.short_description: Granny's had enough. Armed with a minigun and a bad attitude, she's cutting through five stages of demonic suburbia, hellfire, and the forces of darkness itself.

items.title: 宽恕我（Show me mercy） Demo
items.short_description: 《宽恕我》是一款主要为像素风格的悬疑AVG乙女游戏，您将通过扮演主角莉莉丝，体验成为公爵遗孀的生活。每章节的阶段性目标为杀死对您或其他人产生威胁的对象，您可以自由选择谋杀方式和动手时机、在动手前进行祷告以请求宽恕。当然，不同选择将带来不同的结局，请尽量达成完美犯罪避免被送上审判席。同时您将于四位男主产生交集，他们分别是你的继子、青梅竹马兼小镇牧师、年轻的治安官、神秘药剂师。您可以选择对他们坦诚相待或隐瞒您的想法甚至和他们达成合作，在最终章中您可以选择其一成为您的最终共犯，这将开启不同结局。祝您游玩愉快。

items.title: Orbital Physics Simulator
items.short_description: Master physics in this hardcore orbital simulator where Einstein’s theories come to life. Plot trajectories and manipulate spacetime via general relativity, time dilation, and length contraction. Command your starship, outrun time, and explore a universe governed by real physics.

items.title: 木偶之匣
items.short_description: 《木偶之匣》是一款2D平面解谜游戏，你将进入维多利亚时期的神秘庄园，开启一幕野心和欲望交织的悲剧。穿行于诡异的木偶之间，运用智慧，解开谜题，搜集线索，夺取义眼，探寻索恩家族衰败的真相。

items.title: 释厄传
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 13 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《释厄传》是一款主打【后西游都市怪谈】的牌组构建式Roguelike！在这个神佛异化的世界里，利用逆天科技增强牌组，为卡牌打上专属词条。搭配1000+海量卡牌与300+法宝，构筑属于你的极致爽局！

items.title: EvoluCell Demo
items.short_description: 免费试玩：仅第1章（约20～30分钟）。射击·吞噬·炎症风暴，3次基因商店，Boss节律原体。更多章节与形态进化开发中，欢迎愿望单。

items.title: THE MIDNIGHT QUEENS
items.short_description: A crime-themed RPG Maker game taking place in the streets of Vancouver. Featuring a large cast of cute, and dangerous chibi girls.

items.title: 矿业帝国
items.short_description: 在《矿业帝国》中，你将从基础采矿开始，不断开采资源、升级和部署装备，实现矿场全自动运转。利用炸药突破深层矿脉，解锁转生强化与高阶科技，持续扩大你的产业版图，最终建立属于自己的矿业帝国

items.title: 黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout
items.short_description: 在《黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout》中，堆叠离谱联武器，赌出逆天搭配，让战舰战力无限膨胀。每一次选择都在失控边缘狂飙——直到你碾碎整片星海。

items.title: 你妈真漂亮
items.short_description: 一个发生在夏天的故事。一对同样是在单亲家庭长大的好友，都有着优秀的母亲，而他们各自暗恋着对方的母亲。

items.title: 挂机破坏神 IdleDiablo
items.short_description: 《挂机破坏神 IdleDiablo》是一款以装备驱动为核心的类暗黑挂机刷宝游戏。无需繁琐操作，通过挂机的形式即可获取游戏内的所有资源，利用自身智慧合理搭配装备和技能即可击败各种强大的怪物屹立世界之巅！

items.title: 家喵二三事 Vol. 2
items.short_description: Mint and her friends return in NEKO-MIMI SWEET HOUSEMATES 2! In order to save her family, a girl will defy fate itself and become the personification of miracles...

items.title: Synergy Strike
items.short_description: Combine synergy attacks, shatter geometric hordes, and climb the leaderboards! Synergy Strike is a bullet heaven roguelike with hypnotic audio-reactive visuals that pulse to the beat.

items.title: Chop Loop Demo
items.short_description: 一款3D增量式伐木游戏，每棵树都会改变你的玩法。解锁独特的树木机制，用符文控制哪些树木出现，并升级海狸来实现伐木自动化

items.title: 猫咪の世界
items.short_description: 本游戏猫咪の世界受PokeRouge启发，采用类似Snes Mode7的复古视觉效果，结合传统回合制游戏的框架，以自动化战斗刷宝为增量进行队伍养成。 你可以保留等级和装备，投入到以后的战斗中。装备可刷属性，可打造词条。游戏包含属性克制，技能需要合理分配。

items.title: Item Shop Simulator
items.short_description: 在澳大利亚内陆经营一家物品商店。出售剑、药水和鸸鹋蛋。探索15个地牢获取战利品。你的顾客们工作赚钱，然后在你的商店消费……前提是你能保证供货。

items.title: OxVOID Demo
items.short_description: OxVOID —— 一款极简风格的解谜游戏，在这里，物理、逻辑与环境作为一个统一系统共同运作。 通过精心设计的挑战掌握规则。 然后打破边界——在内置关卡编辑器中创造属于你自己的关卡。

items.title: One Billion Ducks Demo
items.short_description: An incremental journey about duck hunting with your canine companions. Shoot rare ducks, sell them, upgrade your abilities, and collect one billion ducks to combat world hunger!

items.title: Orbosis Gloriosis
items.short_description: 一款基于物理的增量游戏，在其中你分裂并合并球体。

items.title: 铁鸟
items.short_description: 正统纵向卷轴弹幕射击×肉鸽。 10架各具特色的战机、10种子机、数十种宇宙之力。 在弹幕的缝隙中穿行，打造你的神级构建。

items.title: Phemx Demo
items.short_description: Phemx is a simple but increasingly challenging retro-style arcade game. Use your paddle to bounce the balls to safety and get a big score!

808 explores the memories that define us and what happens when they're taken away. It's a surreal game about love, loss, and a difficult choice: the pain of authenticity, or the peace of self forgetfulness.

items.title: Hakoniwa Base Ball Demo
items.short_description: A baseball simulation inspired by Japanese professional baseball. Manage drafts, FA, contracts, and stadium finances with an accessible interface. Customize your league, team count, and season length to recreate KBO, CPBL, or MLB-scale play. Depth without complexity.

items.title: 暗黑修仙塔防
items.short_description: 这是以英雄构筑+元素反应+装备掉落为核心玩法的3D塔防，邀你集结九系灵根修士，布下绝杀仙阵抵御魔潮。金、木、水、火等九大灵根自由搭配，触发超载、冻结、神雷、湮灭等百种元素连锁，AOE爆屏炸怪，尽享视觉与策略双重快感。 二十余位男女老幼、人妖异族修士任你操控，普攻、元素战技、元素爆发三大技能可升级强化，实时把控施法时机即可扭转战局。挑战BOSS、通关掉落稀有装备与专武，自由堆攻击、暴击、元素增伤等流派，穿戴装备更能解锁炼气至化神的修仙境界。 3D俯视角清晰掌控战场，多路径来敌、随机怪物、多BOSS入侵让每局都新鲜。战役、无尽、挑战三大模式，休闲与高难兼顾，策略与操作并存，体验布防刷怪爽感！

items.title: Amnesia Bullet Demo
items.short_description: 《Amnesia Bullet》试玩版是一款支持陀螺仪瞄准的第三人称射击游戏。可游玩开场剧情、教程和第一个记忆关卡。

items.title: Backrooms Untold
items.short_description: Backrooms Untold is an atmospheric horror experience where you’re lost in an endless, infinite maze of fluorescent lit corridors, stained carpet, and humming lights. The deeper you go, the more it feels wrong—familiar spaces twisting into something hostile and unknowable.

items.title: Bodian's Bay Wash Demo
items.short_description: 一款令人放松的海底VR清洁模拟游戏！使用高压水枪和刮刀清理船体，粉碎藤壶，并扩展你专属的海底清洗站。购买家具，升级设备，准备迎接体型巨大的巨无霸客户吧！

items.title: Astaryn: RPG Idler
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 13 篇用户评测中有 69% 为好评。
items.short_description: Astaryn: Chained Realms 是一款长期放置奇幻 RPG：选择英雄职业，离线训练专业，制作装备和食物，提升战力，准备挑战地下城，并解锁宏大的任务战役。

items.title: ANVİLFALL
items.short_description: 管理最后的矮人要塞。战前制定部队计划，带领战士生存下去，不断发展壮大，搜寻资源，招募更强大的部队，并观察你的决策如何影响战斗结果。

items.title: Oro Cade Demo
items.short_description: Master ORO CADE, a relaxing 3D logic puzzler. Target color groups to clear the board, but don’t break the chain or blocks will reappear! Demo contains 10 of 70 handcrafted levels, 3 modes of difficulty and a dynamic soundtrack.

items.title: Forgive Me My Love
items.short_description: 关于内疚的沉重压力的心理恐怖。 经历一场毁灭性悲剧的后果：你的妻子死了，这是你的错。 但是当她的棺材被带回家时，一些令人费解和可怕的东西开始扭曲你的现实。..

items.title: FISH
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 84 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: FISH is a Platformer Run & Gun Shooter where you play as an armed FISH violently exploring through multiple levels. The game features a funny, unique stylized artstyle that could get a chuckle out of you!

items.title: Election Train
items.short_description: A turn-based strategy card game where up to 4 players compete for votes across real-world maps. Play cards, control cities, dominate regions, and outsmart your rivals to win the election. 7 maps, 4 unique parties, and dynamic disaster events.

items.title: Pull Factor
items.short_description: Turn a tiny magnet into a metal-devouring machine as you upgrade, retry, and conquer chaotic arcade stages.

items.title: Crazy Neighbour
items.short_description: A psychological horror game set in a small post-Soviet town. You play as a troubled man, drowning himself in cheap beer while being pulled deeper into the shadows of his dark past.

items.title: Neverwood
items.short_description: You journey through the haunted forest of Neverwood in board game orchestrated by a dark and mysterious game master named Bella. The game blends grid based combat with deckbuilding roguelike mechanics in a dreary yet somewhat cozy Halloween themed atmosphere.

items.title: Push It! Demo
items.short_description: PUSH IT! is a local split-control co-op game about two operators running an unstable emergency reactor.

items.title: Goo Deer
items.short_description: Goo Deer is a dark, first-person gas station management game set in a foggy world addicted to the strange drink Goo Deer. Craft and sell Goo Deer, manage inventory, and hire employees. you venture into the misty forest to hunt deer for ingredients. avoiding a dangerous creature lurking in the fog

items.title: Veil: Project Conductor
items.short_description: The train derails in an abandoned tunnel.No signal, no exits — only darkness and the broken remains of the carriage.You are an undercover journalist, and you had a reason to be on this train.

items.title: Knight on the Moon
items.short_description: Built for the original Nintendo Entertainment System hardware, this top-down action-adventure challenges players to survive and explore a hostile moon crawling with alien life, abandoned bases, and deadly secrets.

items.title: Clash of Courts
items.short_description: Enter the arena and clash for glory in this fast-paced fantasy multiplayer experience for the NES or PC. Play with up to 6 players

items.title: Shatterhold
items.short_description: 放置生存与共享世界的融合之作。你的据点 24 小时产出资源。你的远征推回正在崩裂的现实。25 个区域，8,000 片地块，一个共同的世界。每位玩家都至关重要。成败由你所在的整个区域共享。

items.title: Jack Pottwin: House of Odds Demo
items.short_description: Fight your way up a casino tower to wake from a fever dream in this Roguelike Deckbuilder. Craft your deck, modify runs with lucky coins, and control the Odds. Fuse cards to build high value attacks, trigger poker combos to add powerful combat traits to your cards.

items.title: Deliverage
items.short_description: Deliverage is a hardcore open-world PvP delivery game where every shipment is a gamble. Fight other players for valuable cargo, repair and modify fragile vehicles, outplay rivals in a shifting economy, and climb from nothing to the top of a ruthless world.

items.title: Kitty Krush
items.short_description: Kitty Krush 是一个关于蜂群意识猫文明奴役人类的温馨猫咪故事。在简化的卡组构筑玩法中，每轮游玩解锁章节。根据真实故事改编。

items.title: Plant Nursery Simulator
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 264 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款轻松模拟游戏中经营温馨的植物苗圃。种植作物，补充货架，服务顾客。扩建温室，雇佣员工，装饰梦想店铺。适合喜欢治愈农场和模拟游戏的玩家。

items.title: Oleander-X Demo
items.short_description: Oleander-X is a pixel-art stealth action game about classified missions, buried evidence, and a cure that should never have existed. Infiltrate guarded facilities, gather proof, plant explosives, and escape before the truth turns against you.

items.title: The Bone Crypt
items.short_description: Steam’s first PvP Domino Deckbuilder! Connect pips on bone tiles to chain attacks and outsmart enemies in a tactical roguelike tomb. Master a deep solo campaign or crush rivals in online PvP. No cards, just pure bone-clinking strategy. Do you have the marrow to escape the crypt?

items.title: Neon Pulsefire
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Create an endless variety of unique builds and decimate huge waves of enemies. Unlock unique classes, weapons, passives and stats to unlock even more overpowered builds as you weave your way through enemies, arena hazards and projectile assaults.

items.title: Acatalepsy
items.short_description: Welcome to Acatalepsy, a new take on the liminal space experience. Progress deeper into varying liminal spaces with your team. Complete various tasks to continue forward, dive deeper, and don't expect to survive for long. You aren't alone in these spaces; nowhere is safe.

items.title: Age of Resistance
items.short_description: Age of Resistance 是一款以南美洲为背景的现代大战略游戏。实时（可暂停）管理经济、内部稳定、政治意识形态和地区冲突。你能成功称霸整个大陆吗？

items.title: Neon Planet
items.short_description: 在霓虹外星行星上建立生活。耕作、钓鱼、烹饪、制作、装饰你的家。深入100层矿井，攀登战斗尖塔，在赌场获胜。单人游玩或与 最多24名朋友一起，体验玩家驱动的经济。

items.title: Neofold
items.short_description: 一款无限生物收集游戏，每只生物都由你的GPU实时生成，独一无二。孵化无穷无尽的奇妙物种，收养你喜爱的那些，在桌面上培育一个只属于你的活力生态园。

items.title: Slimecity
items.short_description: An ADORABLELY SQUISHY rougelite game~! Command your army of slimes using the power of overwhelming number of Slime to gather and claim resources! But be AWARE of the time, because if it runs out before your lil guys are home, then The Horsemen will come charging!

items.title: Rise Of Eurevia
items.short_description: 击败地下城中的强大敌人，获取传奇装备！成为你所属阵营中的强大战士，并在战场上碾压你的对手！

items.title: SAND: Raiders of Sophie
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 818 篇用户评测中有 60% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在架空的1910年，驾驶巨型“践踏者”穿越索菲的沙海展开搜刮。建造你高度可自定义的步行基地，单人或组队行动，收集战利品、武器与珍贵遗物。在历史与混乱锻造的程序生成荒漠中，与其他玩家激烈交锋。

items.title: Bootloop
items.short_description: Brain busting puzzles to drive you loopy. Set up to 8 instructions that loop infinitely to reach the exit. Jump over obstacles and pitfalls, and use walls to your advantage. All Easy, Medium and Hard puzzles unlocked, so attempt them in any order.

items.title: Carmilla : Crimson Moon Demo
items.short_description: A dark yuri horror visual novel inspired by a classic gothic novella. When the enigmatic Carmilla arrives, Laura is swept into a fever dream of obsession. Is this stranger the cure for her loneliness or a herald of corruption? And what caused the mysterious deaths of two girls in the nearby village?

items.title: Café Manager
items.short_description: 创建一个温馨的咖啡馆，招聘最优秀的团队，将你的小生意变成城里的热门话题。定制每一个细节，让顾客满意，看着你的利润不断增长。最好的咖啡馆就是你亲手打造的咖啡馆！

items.title: Lumina Veil
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Lumina Veil, a horror game with a modern twist! Step into the shoes of a popular streamer on a journey into a strange new game. As you dive deeper, you'll find yourself escaping the isolation of your own world, only to discover that the lines between fantasy and reality are beginning to blur.

items.title: Veil of Mist
items.short_description: Life ends… but the story doesn’t. After death, you find yourself in a strange, distorted place where normal logic no longer applies. Explore, hide, solve puzzles, and try to figure out exactly where you’ve ended up.

items.title: Jungle Defenders
items.short_description: Get ready for a wild third-person action journey where nature strikes back! In this explosive roguelike bullet hell, you play as fearless animals sworn to protect their forest from a relentless technological threat: invading robots set on exploiting natural resources and destroying the environment.

items.title: Reflection Arena
items.short_description: 这是一款在流弹飞舞的封闭竞技场中，挑战闪避与拦截极限的射击动作游戏。

items.title: Parkour & Freerunning Demo
items.short_description: Run, jump, swim, dive, climb, wall-run, vault, roll, flip, balance, crouch, crawl, walk, slide, hang, swing, zipline, and more through hand-crafted and randomly generated locations and challenges! Enjoy unlimited, re-playable time trials, races, trick score, tag, hide & seek, and a whole lot more!!

items.title: Silent Dread: Last Order Demo
items.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game about a late-night delivery and the disturbing events that follow.

items.title: 圣火守望者：共筑防线
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 108 篇用户评测中有 53% 为好评。
items.short_description: 迎击铺天盖地的敌潮，筑起钢铁防线！在《圣火守望者：共筑防线》满屏怪物的围攻下，一边疯狂输出，一边即时建造塔楼、围墙与防御设施。搜刮随机神器，强化武器与英雄配置，死守竞技场中央的信标——只要信标未灭，战斗永不停歇！支持单人游玩，亦可2-4人热血联机。

items.title: Ponder Thy Realm
items.short_description: Observe magical environments, memorize your surroundings, detect magical aberrations, and report them before time runs out on the clock and reality unravels in this first-person observation game.

items.title: Hero of Sunset
items.short_description: 踏上这款复古像素风的开放世界动作冒险之旅。探索、战斗、解谜、挑战Boss——最重要的是，你还能与可爱的女孩们谈恋爱！

items.title: Flagship Down Demo
items.short_description: Tactical roguelike auto-battler. Assemble your fleet and equip your flagship with modules and weapons. Recruit and assign crew members to your ships. Start the round and watch your strategy unfold in fully automated battles.

items.title: Scales of Silence
items.short_description: 腾出沙发，开启贪吃蛇本地合作。一款以长度为生命的本地派对游戏：最多8人共享同一屏幕进行PvP对战，外加2人合作剧情战役。先把朋友缩短，免得被朋友缩短。

items.title: Signs and Seasons Explorer
items.short_description: Explore time and space as you learn about astronomy and earn stars to buy overlays for the Earth and Sun and control the passage of time. Soon you will be able to simulate and observe Earth/Sun correspondences from any age and perspective as you use keyboard and mouse controls to fly through space.

items.title: Cleanup Crew
items.short_description: Fight through dangerous space stations in this 2d Bird's eye rougelike dungeon crawler! Clean up as many stations as you can!

items.title: Dungebra Demo
items.short_description: Dungebra 是一款黑暗奇幻 roguelike 卡牌构筑游戏。你将一次选择多张卡牌，触发连击、超载和序列，在一局游戏中构筑牌组，并把每个回合变成爆发性的出牌组合。

items.title: Unstable Nuclear Reactor Demo
items.short_description: 一款增量式六边形益智类roguelite游戏，玩家需要合并原子元素来防止核泄漏。

items.title: 娱游暇日
items.short_description: 《娱游暇日》由热爱游戏的教育工作者参与制作，专为全年龄段用户打造综合休闲游戏合集。主打轻量运行、纯净体验，收录全球经典棋类、亲子益智小游戏、逻辑脑力训练等多元内容，支持本地多人同玩和离线游戏，无论独处休闲还是亲子互动，亦或亲友欢聚，都能享受轻松愉快的休闲时光~

items.title: 疯狂轮盘 / Bingle Bingle
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 582 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《疯狂轮盘》是一款超带劲的 “轮盘构筑” 策略游戏！在这里，你可以DIY专属自己的轮盘，把各种小球、筹码分配、代币、槽位和徽章玩转组合，触发让人肾上腺素狂飙的超强Buff！狠狠赚它个几百万、几千万筹码，赢下这场赌场对决吧！

items.title: Hamster Pet: Desktop Companion
items.short_description: 免费领养一只住在你屏幕上的桌面仓鼠！喂养它、看它成长、解锁进化形态，并与其他玩家进行PvP对战。是工作或玩耍时陪伴你的完美虚拟宠物。

items.title: Spirits of Baciu Demo
items.short_description: 《巴丘之灵》（Spirits of Baciu）讲述了一只形似猫咪的小精灵在巴丘的漆黑林莽中突然醒来的神秘冒险故事。你需要帮助它一路解开重重难题，直面居住在这片诡谲秘境中的精怪，最终离开这片丛丛密林。

items.title: Plus/Minus Zero
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: As a research android, learn what it is to be human by living a student life in this bittersweet slice of life visual novel. Record new experiences, revel in mundanity, and be a strange machine and a strange person.

items.title: 黑暗卷轴
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 44 篇用户评测中有 63% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《黑暗卷轴》是一款奇幻主题的动作平台游戏，融合了弹幕射击类混乱场面与轻度Rogue的成长式玩法，集魅力、挑战与神秘于一身。

items.title: Ashes of Morgravia
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
items.short_description: Ashes of Morgravia 是一款暗黑策略卡牌构筑游戏，利用双卡组移动、攻击、适应，对抗坏死恐怖。揭开失落神秘，奋战求生于永恒黑夜吞噬的世界中.

items.title: Zentrya Dungeon Dive Demo
items.short_description: A group of adventurers work their way through a dungeon with the goal of clearing it. Finding new threats along the way.

items.title: Sun Catcher Demo
items.short_description: Restore damaged stained glass art and immerse yourself in a charming story about lost memories and community in Sun Catcher, a cozy paint-by-numbers tale.

items.title: Liminal Backrooms Demo
items.short_description: A co-op horror game for up to 4 players where you explore Backrooms-inspired levels, solve puzzles, find exits, and survive entities with different rules. *Limited levels.

items.title: Astaryn: RPG Idler Demo
items.short_description: Try the early-game slice of Astaryn: RPG Idler. Pick a class, train professions, craft supplies, grow your hero, and begin a slow-burn idle fantasy campaign with offline progress and preparation-based combat.

items.title: Coinqueror
items.short_description: Coinqueror 是一款回合制策略游戏。你可以通过圈出敌方领土来进行征服，而战斗的结果由掷硬币决定！分享房间代码与好友一起游玩，建造防御城墙，结成联盟，并统治整个地图。

items.title: WEGO World War II: Desert War
items.short_description: Brian Kelly's WEGO World War II: Desert War captures the drama of the campaign for North Africa during World War II.

items.title: VOIDRAVE Demo
items.short_description: 一款霓虹弹幕射击游戏，你飞得越深，空间就越不正常。穿越100波敌人和20个手工像素Boss，用肉鸽能力改造你的战机，揭示真相：你不是在穿越虚空，你就在虚空之中。

items.title: Memory Games
items.short_description: This game is a classic memory game with multiple levels and beautiful graphics. Enjoy!

items.title: The Lost Within
items.short_description: A paranormal investigator enters an ancient forest shrouded in rumors of a mad woman. In this first-person horror, players explore dark thickets for clues and hidden evidence. Solving atmospheric puzzles reveals the truth as the boundary between sanity and madness collapses.

items.title: Leap of Legends
items.short_description: 一款欢乐免费的 2D 平台跳跃游戏，动物伙伴们在缤纷世界里跳跃、弹跳、竞速。支持 Windows、macOS、iOS 和 Android 的跨平台在线多人游戏，外加单屏本地同乐和单人闯关。老少咸宜，易学难精。

items.title: Totally Safe Delivery NOT
items.short_description: Totally Safe Delivery NOT 是一款混乱又搞笑的 rage game，在这里一切都绝对安全。嗯……几乎是。 你扮演一名刚入职的新手员工，任务看起来非常简单：把载有原子材料的平台安全送到核心。 听起来很容易？当然不可能。 问题是：罐子绝对不能从平台上掉下来。要是真的掉了，你的工作日将会以一场非常不专业的爆炸结束。 在前往目标的路上，你的同事们还设置了各种陷阱，只为了毁掉你的一天。湿滑的地板、恶意满满的障碍、残酷的惊喜，以及各种会让你怀疑“这家公司到底是谁批准运营的？”的情况。

items.title: Echowood
items.short_description: 放松身心，享受回音森林的宁静——这是一款冒险农场模拟游戏。 游戏背景设定在一个被自然取代人类的世界。人类过度伤害了自然，因此遭到了自然的毁灭。自那以后，世界变得宁静而平和。

items.title: High On Life 2 Demo
items.short_description: 在这款《High On Life 2》免费试玩版中，揭开威胁银河系的星际阴谋一角！善用那些会说话的外星枪械，拯救你那位亡命天涯的姐姐，并揭露深藏在外星动物园深处的黑暗秘密……

items.title: Wormhusk Demo
items.short_description: The world is dying. The answer lies beneath. Dig deep into the husk of an ancient god-worm, build your defenses, slay the parasites that feed on its remains, and uncover the truth before it's too late.

items.title: SurfaceBox
items.short_description: Surf the infinite ocean of Titan, Saturn's moon. Perform epic stunts, avoid creatures and emerging obstacles and fight your way to the top of the global Top 5. A single fall can cost you all your points.

items.title: Vibrant Vector
items.short_description: Vibrant Vector is a neon arcade roguelike where geometric entities collide in chaotic and vibrant battles. Create absurd builds, survive increasingly intense waves, and face powerful bosses in an abstract universe full of energy and motion.

items.title: Space Grunts: Chrono Shard
items.short_description: 掌控时间，阻击软泥。 银河系正遭受致命感染，你需要在这款节奏极快的回合制Roguelike游戏中运用智慧杀出重围。利用“时空碎片”的力量重置时间循环，有策略地将装备、资源与环境改造留给未来的自己。亲手打造毁灭性的军火库，通过深度的技能树进化你的角色，解锁包括狙击手、工程师在内的多种精英子职业。在这个危机四伏的宇宙中，死亡不再是终点，而是通往胜利的必经之路。利用独特的武器冲击波操纵战场，将每一次失败转化为制胜的契机。准备好在循环中不断进化，终结这场星际灾难了吗？

items.title: Arma: Cold War Assault Remastered Demo
items.short_description: 定义类型的经典之作，全新重制。Arma: Cold War Assault Remastered Demo 将 2001 年原作的引擎带到现代 64 位 Windows 与 Linux 平台。免费、开源，同时还可作为官方资源包，用于制作你自己的 Arma 任务与 Mod。

items.title: Gaslamp Cases 6: Haunted Waters
items.short_description: Morgan, Jack and their colleague Eleano have to solve a new case with a dissapeared ship. Help them by solving exciting Match-3 puzzles and gather the resources you need to unlock every new upgrade. Earn 20 upgrades follow Morgan’s investigation across 5 chapters as the new case unfolds.

items.title: Levitar 3D
items.short_description: A 3D gravity shooter with infinite procedurally generated levels and hints of Thrust, Gravitar and Lunar Lander.

items.title: Idle Chapel
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 37 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
items.short_description: 这是一款暗黑奇幻风格的增量游戏，剧情围绕对抗崛起的邪教展开。寻找投靠邪神的信徒，运用雷霆手段使其回归光明正道。借助信徒的“虔诚值”来壮大自身，荡涤这片大地上的污秽——逐次点击，终结邪乱。

items.title: Upward
items.short_description: Try to stay alive for as long as possible, by avoiding various enemies and obstacles while collecting as many apples as your heart desires. Play against friends, unlock cool cosmetics or achieve a new highscore. The choice is up to you.

items.title: Drunk or Baby
items.short_description: 一款混乱欢乐的派对游戏，支持1至8名玩家参与。玩家需要猜测各种离奇的真实事件究竟是醉酒成年人还是婴儿造成的，并通过推理、投票和欢笑赢得胜利。

items.title: Mine Farm
items.short_description: Mine Farm is a progressive mining RPG centered on the pure joy of looting. Mine various minerals, challenge colossal entities, and find your way out of the unknown. Be warned: the journey home won't be easy.

items.title: 森灵旅社
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 33 篇用户评测中有 78% 为好评。
items.short_description: 为迷路的生灵，点一盏回家的灯。欢迎来到《森灵旅社》，一个被宁静守护，却又被一场“非自然”之疾悄然笼罩的村庄。在这里，你将经营一间温馨的动物旅社，亲手开垦田地、照料形形色色的动物，并与村民们一同重建社区。在悠闲的田园生活中，你将逐渐揭开村庄的秘密，用自己的双手，让森林重获新生！

items.title: Синеморск oil inclusive
items.short_description: A visual novel about an environmental disaster. Coordinate volunteers, make difficult decisions, and try to survive as you try to save a coastal town dying from an oil spill.

items.title: Safe Quacker
items.short_description: Safe Quacker is a cute 3D incremental heist game where you play as a duck thief pecking loot, collecting treasure, upgrading your beak, unlocking tougher vault rooms, and cracking the legendary Golden Egg for prestige.

items.title: Синеморск oil inclusive Demo
items.short_description: A visual novel about an environmental disaster. Coordinate volunteers, make difficult decisions, and try to survive as you try to save a coastal town dying from an oil spill.

items.title: ATOMIC BOT: SURVIVOR ON PLANETS
items.short_description: Upgrade your combat robot, survive endless enemy waves, discover powerful weapon synergies, and free different planets from evil clones in this fast-paced survivor-like action game.

items.title: 梦想翻新家
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 137 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: 给你一间旧屋，把它打造成梦想中的小家吧！拾起杂物、清理污渍、布置房间。这里是你专属的安全屋，没有既定规则和目标，一切都随你心意。把烦恼像垃圾一样丢掉，把坏心情像污渍一样擦去，让你的心灵和小屋一起焕然一新！准备好迎接你的新家了吗？一、二、三——欢迎回家！

items.title: Last Dose
items.short_description: Last Dose is a 1st-person psychological horror game. Explore a dark house and solve intricate puzzles to uncover terrifying secrets.

items.title: TESSERACT: Echoes of the North
items.short_description: An atmospheric puzzle-platformer where you create echoes of yourself to solve ancient mechanisms hidden within the ruins of the North.

items.title: Arduo
items.short_description: A peaceful planet has been attacked by mysterious robotic enemies from outer space. Take control of your character, battle through dangerous stages, defeat hostile machines, and defend your home from destruction.

items.title: Challenge 99 Demo
items.short_description: A highly challenging game made for platformer enthusiasts.

items.title: 异星战场
items.short_description: 驾驶战舰消灭外星孢子赚取星币，用星币解锁天赋、技能与舰长，开启新地图和新品种孢子。解锁全部内容、强化战舰，体验增量养成收割乐趣。

items.title: Greed and Greed
items.short_description: Greed and Greed is the sequel for Greed and Grind. It's a game where your main goal is to become strongeeeer!! You can grind as much as you want!

items.title: Catopia
items.short_description: A desktop pet sim where a pixel cat lives on your wallpaper while you work. Choose one of five cats — Cheese, Cloud, Pumpkin, Cotton, or Oreo. Feed, play, wash, and pet to build affection. Neglect its health and it falls ill; neglect its heart and it walks away for good.

items.title: Off Gridders
items.short_description: Crush the competition in this fast-paced team sport where every second counts! Slide, run, catch the ball and face off the opposing team in an abandoned arena to score maximum points in high energy matches!

items.title: Stick Infinite Kingdom Demo
items.short_description: Master strategic gameplay as you build, train, and upgrade units to protect your base. With an immersive storyline, stunning visuals, and easy controls, it's an epic battle for survival!

items.title: Agraria
items.short_description: Some days you just want to dig in the dirt and watch something grow. Agraria gets it. Build your dream farm at your own pace - tilling, planting, harvesting, and slowly building an agricultural empire - all under the caring, non-intrusive guidance of Agraria Inc. (Terms and conditions may apply.)

items.title: 拉面模拟器
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 70% 为好评。
items.short_description: 「拉面模拟器」是「烧肉模拟器」的製作团队的最新作！喜爱拉面的朋友们，想不想尝试制作属于自己的独创拉面呢？

items.title: 闲鱼修仙录
items.short_description: 一款修仙题材的Roguelike卡牌策略游戏。选择李闲鱼、小雪或陆寒渊三位修士之一，在 随机生成的三幕冒险中构建卡组、收集法宝、布置阵法。214张法术卡牌涵盖摸鱼、暴力 、灼烧、反伤等多种流派，金木水火土五行相克影响每一次出牌决策。98个随机奇遇、42 件法宝、12种阵法、9种结局、21级天道试炼难度。每一局都是独一无二的修仙之旅。

items.title: Babel Legacy Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款采集资源、 发展 城市的放置类游戏。 尽情欣赏城市不断壮大的模样吧。

items.title: NONEWORLD
items.short_description: NONEWORLD is a cute RPG set in a dying world. You are a Princess from another world, accompanied by an omnipresent Cheshire Cat. Only you and your allies can return the Princess home safely.

items.title: 血月 Demo
items.short_description: 《血月 Blood Moon》是一款融合 Roguelike 构筑、基地防守与即时战斗的仙侠题材动作策略游戏。白天探索地图、收集装备与资源，夜晚抵御不断来袭的妖魔大军。体验版包含可游玩的核心玩法循环、2个英雄、丰富的技能与装备构筑，以及强大的Boss挑战。

items.title: FOOTBALL DRIVE
items.short_description: Drive a truck carrying a Huge Football, draw ramps and bridges, and use creative physics-based solutions to guide the ball safely to the goal.

items.title: Qumino Demo
items.short_description: Qumino is a cozy roguelike domino game. There are different heroes with unique abilities that make every deck playthrough different. Build your deck with different domino tiles and think about what you need for the run.

items.title: Pitch & Pixel
items.short_description: 征战30年的数字营销机构发展史——优化销售与营销，交付项目，壮大团队，并智取竞争对手。完全模拟的市场以及自由选择的成功之路——是打造高品质的精品工作室，还是庞大的机构集团？一切由你决定。

items.title: Spider Subway
items.short_description: Spider Subway is a game built around speedrun, challenging players to escape from a subway in the fastest possible time. The trains operate according to a timetable that players can customize themselves. Fine-tune the schedule down to one hundredth of a second and beat your best time.

items.title: Reborn: The Evil Being
items.short_description: 一款开放世界动作冒险游戏 探索一个充满魔法、谜团与隐藏危险的绚丽幻想世界。在第一人称或第三人称视角中战斗，击败怪物、揭示秘密，并在旅途中不断成长，寻找你来到这个世界背后的真相。

items.title: Where Stones Sleep
items.short_description: A cozy, single-screen puzzle platformer focused on planning, experimentation, and clear cause-and-effect, with no combat or time pressure.

items.title: Punt! Rollin Raccoons
items.short_description: The Raccoons are out and up to no good! Punt your very own Raccoon and cause havoc in this Pinball inspired arcade game. Destroy whatever is in your path, complete missions, and customize your rotund friend.

items.title: Playful Pursuit
items.short_description: Playful Pursuit 是一款色彩缤纷的 3D 冒险平台游戏，你可以跳跃、攀爬、解谜、对抗滑稽的敌人、收集 VHS 录像带，并在一场欢乐的高沙漠任务中与伙伴建立友谊，救回 Eddy 被偷走的泰迪熊。

items.title: Veiled Vents
items.short_description: Keep an ancient megabuilding alive and thriving with the help of VENTBA !

items.title: FAST FOOD FUNKIN'
items.short_description: Have some beats with yo' mickey dee double-cheese. A high-caloric FRIDAY NIGHT FUNKIN' parody game made for the annual Flash Forward Jam on Newgrounds

items.title: SlimeSlider Demo
items.short_description: SlimeSlider is a puzzle game about navigating levels by pushing boxes. In each level, you must push boxes in order to overcome (or take advantage of) your tendency to slide in order to direct the blob to the exit portal.

items.title: Blackjack: CHEAT THE HOUSE!
items.short_description: Blackjack: CHEAT THE HOUSE! is a blackjack deck-building roguelike where you collect, buy, and upgrade "cheats" to beat the dealer. Work your way to $1,000,000 and unlock the 6 build trophies - cheat, win, repeat!

items.title: Good Person Demo
items.short_description: Take on the role of the Good Person in this traditional rogue type game in the form of a 1980s aesthetic platformer. Shutdown and avoid a variety of threats to your well being and look to seek validation from various sycophants spread throughout the accursed world.

items.title: Idle Startup
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 109 篇用户评测中有 44% 为好评。
items.short_description: Build a tech company from a one-person garage into a global empire. Train six skills, complete their upgrade trees, chase milestone bonuses, and unlock new departments in this clean, addictive incremental idle game — progress keeps rolling even while you're away.

items.title: Ball Slickers
items.short_description: Ball Slickers is a fast paced football party game mixing third person and top down action. Slide to steal the ball, kick to score, and outplay friends in chaotic, physics driven matches.

items.title: Contagion Protocol Demo
items.short_description: Survive an endless undead horde in this brutal auto-battling roguelike. Slash, upgrade, and evolve your arsenal as chaos unfolds to the pulse of an industrial metal soundtrack. Contagion Protocol is fast, bloody, and built for replayability.

items.title: Blik Ball
items.short_description: 3D action in multiplayer or solo. Defeat your opponent in various modes, gain or lose points in direct duels. Blik Ball, a fast-paced 3D action game with lots of fast balls and two paddles.

items.title: 中生代黎明
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 17 篇用户评测中有 70% 为好评。
items.short_description: 🦕《中生代黎明（Mesozoic Dawn）》是一款多人联机恐龙生存游戏。你将从一只脆弱的幼年恐龙开始，在危机四伏的史前荒野中，通过核心的“成长+产卵=进化”系统实现物种跨越式进化。

items.title: Beddua:İlk Düğüm
items.short_description: Some moments wish they never happened. After the accident you caused, you hide in a remote Anatolian village where secrets linger in the shadows of mosques. In this psychological horror by two developers, can you face your conscience? No escape. Only confrontation.

items.title: SYLVA
items.short_description: 荒岛求生之战就此展开。与骷髅战士战斗，建造基地，收集战利品，努力生存下去。开放世界生存角色扮演游戏：SYLVA。

items.title: Skillwood
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 205 篇用户评测中有 92% 为好评。
items.short_description: Skillwood is a relaxing woodcutter simulator inspired by survival simulators and incremental games. Chop wood, mine stone, trade with NPCs, upgrade forests, unlock new trees or new areas and prestige to do even better next run.

items.title: EVIDENCE
items.short_description: EVIDENCE 是一款充满氛围感的 neo-noir 侦探惊悚游戏，你将扮演一名在腐败而疲惫的 Nova City Department 中工作的侦探。

items.title: The Velvet Green Witch : A Quiet Life Demo
items.short_description: A quiet survival RPG about living with a witch in a secluded forest. Gather herbs, hunt for food, and craft potions to sustain your life. Experience the early part of the game in this demo.

items.title: AI Slop
items.short_description: 在这款反AI的放置模拟游戏中，用令人作呕的AI垃圾信息淹没互联网！创建AI画师与智能体引发群愤。当你的垃圾僵尸网络席卷全球时，玩玩“小丑扑克”肉鸽纸牌，或交易高风险的土狗币。你会实现技术奇点，还是直接被告上法庭？

items.title: 射吧！水果人
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一觉醒来，你发现你成了一个水果人？面对身旁无穷无尽追杀你的蔬菜，拿起枪，把它们射爆！

items.title: 遥かなる円形世界 Demo
items.short_description: In New York, private detective Ikeda Sen happens upon the enigmatic Lila shortly before his client Walton hands him a strange device. And in Japan, Izumozaki Neneko stumbles upon a corpse at Horikawa River on her way to school. Two unrelated stories unfold, intersecting in odd and unexpected ways.

items.title: Kill Per Second
items.short_description: Kill Per Second is a top-down shooter with minimal feature so you can concentrate on one thing. Putting your cursor on the enemies. Survive the stages to test your skill.

items.title: Yuntai Demo
items.short_description: 《芸台》是一款剧情向恐怖游戏。何以真失联多年的好友突然来信，邀请她前往芸台市参加乞巧大会。然而当何以真赴约后，却隐隐感觉这场重逢暗藏玄机，一场围绕邪教的超自然异象在此展开。

items.title: Jamhouse Demo
items.short_description: Jamhouse is a fast paced falling block/platformer hybrid. Run, jump, and haul tasty tiles to clear waves of jams falling all around you!

items.title: Oleander-X
items.short_description: Oleander-X is a pixel-art stealth action game about classified missions, buried evidence, and a cure that should never have existed. Infiltrate guarded facilities, gather proof, plant explosives, and escape before the truth turns against you.

items.title: Theseus' Cycle Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款结合生化科幻风格的2D动作与工厂建造游戏。玩家将透过极具张力的高速对刀与极限跳跃击溃异星怪物，并残酷地夺取牠们的血肉与机械碎片。利用这些战利品，你必须从零开始建造并连结一座高度自动化的暗黑能源工厂。透过无情地榨取生物能源并扩张电力系统，你将解锁并深入未知的凶险地域，体验极限战斗掠夺与战略性自动化生产的双重快感。

items.title: Reunion Fate Demo
items.short_description: Reunion Fate is a psychological horror game where terror lurks in the places you think are safe. Use the flame to guide you through the darkness. Explore familiar and unfamiliar places. Hide from them. No one will tell you what you want to hear. And you still don't understand.

items.title: Trolley Time
items.short_description: Cute animals shopping for groceries - what chaos could possibly ensue? Play solo or with up to three friends in this bite-sized game, engaging in frantic action as you try to deliver as many groceries as possible within the time limit!

items.title: Select Eleven Demo
items.short_description: Take charge of a national cricket team. Pick your squad, set your tactics, and live every ball of every match across bilateral series, tournaments, and World Cups. Manage form, fitness, and the personalities in your dressing room as you chase glory for your country.

items.title: Anaa 15 Boss Challenge Demo
items.short_description: Anaa: 15 Boss Challenge is a 3D action boss-fighting game focused on dodging, slashing, upgrading your character, and surviving intense battles against powerful bosses.

items.title: The Unrealtor
items.short_description: A couch co-op puzzle adventure where two players navigate a surreal house tour, solving perspective-based puzzles by matching objects across their splitscreen, and uncovering a shifting maze of impossible architecture.

items.title: 관상
items.short_description: You are a street physiognomist. Daily, you read customers' faces to find auspicious or ill omens. Accuracy brings fame; failure threatens your livelihood. You must survive 31 days by dodging guard raids and paying protection fees. However, this routine won't last long.

items.title: 幼兽帕帕
items.short_description: 在宏大的世界中收集神奇的生物“帕帕”，让他们进行战斗、建造、种地，工业生产等等，这是一款全新开放世界生存制作游戏。

items.title: Wizzerd Quest 2
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 31 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
items.short_description: STOP THE DARK WIZZERD!!! Wizzerd Quest 2 is a retro first-person RPG with unhinged live-action FMV cutscenes, full splitscreen co-op, exciting boss encounters, and a vast open world to explore! Save the Roblins! Save the World! A standalone sequel to the shareware classic Wizzerd Quest!

items.title: They See Me Rollin'
items.short_description: Roll, boost, jump, and smash your way through chaotic procedural tracks in this fast-paced arcade multiplayer racing game.

items.title: Definitely Not a Cult
items.short_description: Build your “totally normal” community, upgrade your base, gather weird resources, recruit suspiciously calm members, and pretend the red flags are just decorative. Manage the chaos, unlock content, earn achievements, and do not ask why everyone keeps talking about pyramids.

items.title: Operation P.L.U.S.H
items.short_description: Operation Plush is a 1-4 player horde defender where you take control of dream-powered plushies defending your child's nighlight from the encroaching nightmare horde. Protect the dream, Defend the nightlight, Defeat the darkness

items.title: EASYROADS
items.short_description: WELCOME TO EASYROADS!! EASYROADS is Fun driving experience you can Race and Drift around, customize your car with going through the paint area. you can drift in tracks but BE CAREFULL, DONT HIT THE WALL! EASYROADS is skill based experience which brings FUN and RAGE. HAVE FUN

items.title: Bob's Island Demo
items.short_description: Fight your way across the island in this open world survival crafting game! Explore, craft, and mine in order to defeat the cursed monstrosities that inhabit the land, uncovering ancient secrets as you face off against strange creatures and challenging bosses!

items.title: Chronicles of High Worlds 1
items.short_description: Epic cinematic fantasy kinetic visual novel.

items.title: Relax Puzzle
items.short_description: 在忙碌的一天中寻找安宁。这款放松疗愈的拼图游戏拥有 100 幅精美的场景。只需简单地拖拽与交换图块，按照自己的节奏完成每张图片。没有时间限制——只有纯粹、无压力的乐趣。

items.title: Reality Stability Office
items.short_description: Reality is unstable, and information is distorted. As an auditor, you must identify anomalies using unreliable systems and conflicting data. But as you begin to lose your sanity, you’ll find yourself trying to control not just these anomalies, but yourself as well.

items.title: 正体 SHOUT-AI
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 15 篇用户评测中有 60% 为好评。
items.short_description: 本作包含心理恐怖、不安的对话、画面噪声、黑屏、故障效果、伪代码日志，以及看起来像是玩家电脑上发生了某种异常的演出。不包含血腥肢解、露骨性内容、药物使用或针对现实人物的真实暴力表现。

items.title: 爆走！ランデブー
items.short_description: A side-scrolling runner where Twitch viewers help or sabotage you with 25+ commands. Run, survive, and watch your character transform. Features 9 characters, Endurance Mode, and Nightmare Mode. Fun for streamers, viewers, and solo players alike.

items.title: 请别叫它粪作啊主播大人: ㅎ廾立立ㅣ 乚卜乚卜己ㅜ
items.short_description: [主播，请别叫它垃圾游戏] 是一款随着关卡推进不断获得“能力丧失”的逆成长型2D平台跳跃游戏。控制可爱的童话风面包店少女“娜娜露”，突破恶魔“雅可”的重重考验。某个祈愿冒险永不结束之人所设下的陷阱，以及逐渐被剥夺的控制感，将不断挑战你的极限。

items.title: Cluck And Tag
items.short_description: 在地图上捕捉游荡的鸡，运送它们并赚取积分！如果你不是“猎人”，就向对手投掷沙滩球，打掉他们的战利品；如果你是“猎人”，就专注于追逐。在这场与朋友或智能AI对抗的混乱追逐战中，得分最高者获胜！

items.title: Radar ATC simulator
items.short_description: This game is an air traffic controller simulator, specifically in a radar environment. It trains multitasking and air traffic reading skills to anticipate events, avoid risks, and optimize air traffic.

items.title: The Last Market Demo
items.short_description: The Last Market is an open-world game set in a post-apocalyptic world where you build a safe zone for survivors and defend it against zombies. It combines survival content with a simulation of managing. Fight zombies, collect sellable items, and grow your safe zone and market by selling them.

items.title: Moment Hunter
items.short_description: Test your timing and precision in Moment Hunter. Watch the scene carefully, find the perfect moment, and take the shot. Easy to learn, hard to master.

items.title: BAENANA
items.short_description: BAENANA 是一款快速的俯视角弹幕竞技场射击游戏，水果英雄对抗一波波敌对蔬菜。强化能力，使用多达六种武器，在密集火力中闪避，并打造强力的 Roguelike 构筑，迎接混乱的射击动作。

items.title: SlackOffDiary
items.short_description: 《异世界旅行日记》是一款节奏轻松的放置经营游戏，带轻度 RPG 战斗。在异世界搭建家园，于酒馆招募伙伴、孵化繁育驯兽，派遣他们踏上冒险、旅行或深渊三种旅途，用战利品驱动粉碎机、矿场、熔炉等建筑生产，再在锻造工坊打造装备、强化至更高等级。 游戏内含种植、料理、商店交易与建筑入驻天赋等完整成长循环。独特的「摸鱼模式」可将画面贴在桌面壁纸上，工作学习间隙一键查看进度，无需频繁切换窗口。碎片时间也能推进基地与装备，适合喜欢挂机经营与桌面轻游玩的玩家。

items.title: 绝色侦探:爱丽丝
items.short_description: 艾青公寓发生了一起命案,1802号公寓女主人离奇死亡,没有任何挣扎,没有打斗痕迹.为何会在深夜死亡,为何男主人不在家中.一切的谜题等待着侦探:爱丽丝破解.真相只有一个,找到最终的真相吧!

items.title: Roll To Freedom
items.short_description: Guide your way through a challenging maze adventure, explore paths, collect rewards, and test your problem solving skills. Every level brings new challenges and opportunities to discover the best route to freedom.

items.title: Working Late
items.short_description: “Working Late is a first-person psychological horror game where players harvest organs, complete hospital quotas, and survive terrifying encounters during a night shift that spirals into madness. Balance surgery mechanics, exploration, and survival while trying to make it to 6 AM.”

items.title: 海边宝藏小铺
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 91 篇用户评测中有 92% 为好评。
items.short_description: 听，海浪退潮了！踩着柔软的细沙，循着探测器清脆的“滴滴”声，挖出深埋沙底的惊喜盲盒！将物件带回工坊，伴随毛刷“唰唰”擦拭的白噪音，体验极致解压的变废为宝。把锃光瓦亮的宝物摆进橱窗，在金币落袋的“叮当”声中用心经营你的海边小店。从贪婪酒店手中买回沙滩——别让浪漫变成私人领地，这片自由的海风归你守护！

items.title: Submerged Lights
items.short_description: After traveling to a country town to move into the house he inherited, Andrew finds the town flooded. While wondering what to do, he spots a dim light coming from the flooded library, in the middle of the night. Investigating, he finds that it belongs to a small fairy, trapped inside of a lantern...

items.title: Last Watchtower Demo
items.short_description: Last Watchtower is a short incremental defense game. Gather resources, pick upgrades, and unlock powerful tower abilities. Experiment with diverse builds, withstand relentless monster waves, and grow stronger with every run through permanent meta-progression.

items.title: PinballRobotDoctor
items.short_description: 「PinballRobotDoctor」 是一款"简单的"弹球游戏。玩家将操控赛博机械弹球"机械修理"装置，指尖把控弹板精反射金属弹球。依靠真实物理回弹逻辑，通过不断碰撞机关破解障碍，最终修理目标完成关卡。

items.title: Bit Dot
items.short_description: 感受与他人一起游玩的乐趣。 查看简化的图画，并一起猜测它们是什么。 自定义并创建属于你自己的独特角色，你可以操控并进行游戏。

items.title: Infinite Space: Mining
items.short_description: Build and automate your own industrial space empire. Mine asteroids, manage logistics, expand production lines with drones and conveyors, explore new sectors through wormholes, and grow your mining operation across the galaxy.

items.title: Diamond Island Demo
items.short_description: Dive into the thrilling world of our First Person Shooter Game, where survival is your only mission. Navigate through intense environments as you hunt for hidden diamonds, each one a step closer to victory

items.title: Midnight Noodle Demo
items.short_description: Play the DEMO of Midnight Noodle! Experience the gripping beginning of Ogik's journey: coming home from work to his parents fighting violently, taking refuge to chill and chat with a friend in the quiet night, and then upon his return... where did his parents go?!! Play the DEMO and Wishlist NOW!

items.title: Akane's After-School Yokai Tales
items.short_description: Bullet Hell Survival / Auto-Shooter. Survive the Onslaught. Weave through enemy swarms and survive until the end.

items.title: Zombie Wasteland Together
items.short_description: 《僵尸废土联机版》是一款支持1-4名玩家合作的僵尸射击游戏，背景设定在末日后的沙漠中。与好友组队，对抗无穷无尽的感染者，并使用强大的武器生存下来。

items.title: Asteroid Extractors Demo
items.short_description: Mine, upgrade and survive in deep space. Extract valuable resources from procedurally generated asteroids and turn a tiny operation into a massive extraction.

items.title: Road Connect Demo
items.short_description: Road Connect is a casual puzzle game inspired by the classic 15 Puzzle, where you must rearrange tiles to build a functional road.

items.title: Two Types Pollos
items.short_description: 合作经营与生存模拟游戏。在经营炸鸡店、接待顾客和装饰店面的同时，在后屋制造“糖”。完成订单以获取维持生命的药物。独自或与好友一起在这场紧张的双重生活中烹饪、管理并生存下去

items.title: Final Deal Demo
items.short_description: A dark comedy card roguelite set inside Blood & Spades, an underground club where sarcastic skeletons, dangerous card games, and terrible decisions somehow became a community. Build absurd combos, survive toxic rules, and try not to disappoint the audience of the dead.

items.title: 公司崛起
items.short_description: 在这款模拟经营游戏中，你将扮演一名创业者，从一个只有几个人的小团队起步，一步步打造属于自己的公司帝国。

items.title: 与夏日姐姐们的甜蜜时光
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 49 篇用户评测中有 67% 为好评。
items.short_description: 时隔多年重返乡间，这个夏天优终于要与哈娜、莉娜、希娜三姐妹重逢了！不料母亲因急事匆匆返家，他将独自与三姐妹共度一段时光。宁静温馨的日式乡村里，等待他的会是怎样的夏日趣事呢？

items.title: 无限面包
items.short_description: 《无限面包》是一款以面包为主题的放置类挂机休闲游戏 您将扮演一尊巨大的面包，为您的面民生产源源不断的食物 使用面包来建设您的领土，见证您帝国的兴盛，享受数值的快感。 整个生产流程的操作十分简易，您可以在养活千万面民的同时空出您的双手来操劳帝国内外的其它要事。

items.title: 星之牧歌
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 51 篇用户评测中有 62% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在神秘的世界中照顾人型圣灵的慢生活牧场经营模拟游戏。 种植作物、饲养圣灵（动物）， 或者与自己喜欢的角色进行交流，恋爱，结婚，孕育后代， 以属于自己的方式度过每日的快乐时光！

items.title: Oath for Glory Demo
items.short_description: Join the tournament as a lowly knight of a small village. A skill-based boss fighting game built around directional combat. Learn, adapt, and master precise melee mechanics where player skill determines victory.

items.title: PX2: The Termination
items.short_description: PX2 is a wonderfully wacky platformer with exquisite music and goofy visuals to top it all off. Jump, shoot, and fall in a hole as you explore the many worlds of PX2!

items.title: Antarctic Showdown 남극결투 Demo
items.short_description: 《Antarctic Showdown》是一款1v1射击肉鸽游戏，每次失败都能强化自己的Build。 干掉你的朋友，夺取胜利！

items.title: Rescue Dogs vs Aliens Tower Defense
items.short_description: Command heroic rescue dogs in a colorful tower defense battle against alien invaders. Build, upgrade, unlock heroes, defend strange battlefields, and survive wave after wave in RDVA-TD: Rescue Dogs vs Aliens.

items.title: Snake Coil: Puzzle Adventure
items.short_description: A relaxing 3D puzzle game where you guide a cute forest snake that grows every move and must fill every tile on the grid.

items.title: Worlda Demo
items.short_description: Jonas the bear cub. That's you, the expert builder, miner, gardener, and serial killer of bunnies (with a shotgun). You have been given a special staff, Stonebreaker, which can break anything: stone, trees, wild boars, flowers, the lot. The only thing it can't break are those honey hives! Grrr.

items.title: Broken Soccer Demo
items.short_description: 史上最荒谬足球游戏的试玩版！在完整版推出前，试着带领外星人、穴居人、嬉皮士、老人、死忠球迷和维京人赢下这座预备杯吧。

items.title: Retronaut
items.short_description: A rogue star pilot lost between galaxies—upgrade your ship, harness ancient artifacts, and survive relentless alien hordes in this cosmic action roguelite.

items.title: Chill Fishing
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Chill Fishing是一段终极悠闲的桌面钓鱼体验！

items.title: Babo & Luda adventure Demo
items.short_description: Babo And Luda Adventure is a chaotic 3D action platformer! Take control of this wild duo and embark on a crazy journey to defeat evil enemies. Master insane combat combos, explore wild environments, and gear up for action packed run and gun stages!

items.title: SIGNAL PIT
items.short_description: A fast-paced monster arena roguelite where every beast has unique passive traits, active skills, and powerful overclock abilities. Build your mutation loadout, survive deadly fights, and evolve between runs.

items.title: The Secret Dungeon
items.short_description: Embark on a 2-player adventure through vast, enchanted realms. Wield weapons, uncover powerful upgrades, and face dark magic as you explore a fallen kingdom. Easy to jump in, with depth for those who venture deeper into the dungeon's mysteries.

items.title: Stickplosion Demo
items.short_description: 免费试玩《Stickplosion》——一款快节奏、混乱的 2D 像素风格斗游戏，每一面墙和地板都可破坏。本试玩版为单人模式：在多种模式中对抗可调节机器人、抽取 Roguelite 强化并切碎竞技场。可游玩最多 1 小时，之后即可购买完整版。

items.title: Ore & Ordnance Demo
items.short_description: Ore & Ordnance is a Retro styled, Sci-fi, Bullet Hell. Survive endless waves of Pirates, Asteroids and Firestorms. Collect upgrades, complete missions and survive your shift! How long will you last?

items.title: Purge Directive
items.short_description: Survive endless waves of the undead in Purge Directive — a 1–4 player online co-op FPS. Earn points per kill, upgrade your arsenal between waves, and see how long you and your squad can hold the line.

items.title: Outscratched Demo
items.short_description: The scratchcard roguelike deckbuilder. Assemble a unique selection of scratchcards, blessed charms, and magical stickers. Discover endless exciting combos to beat the odds against a diabolical lottery.

items.title: Cobot-Man Adventure Demo
items.short_description: Cobot-Man Adventure is an action shooter game against evil robots. It offers a fun and entertaining experience. Discover the excitement and amusement it provides with its action-adventure gameplay. Cobot-Man will face bosses of different kind during the adventure.

items.title: Cave Of Treats
items.short_description: Live a spooky Halloween night as a skeleton dressed up as a mummy! Play a haunted old arcade game that, on Halloween night, can bring monsters out of the TV. Fight off waves of monsters trying to escape the game to steal all your candy!

items.title: Dragon Kisser
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 23 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
items.short_description: Left alone as your little village’s last hope, you: Domingo, know what you must do to save your people and also pull a hot date, and that is to do what you know best: Romance the dragon attacking your home! Put your charisma to the test in this cheeky third-person soulslike boss battle!

items.title: 哈里斯大道上的善举
items.short_description: 在这款简短的PSX风格解谜冒险游戏中，理清哈里斯大道居民们错综复杂的愿望与期许。沐浴在夏日午后的灼热阳光下，探索精心打造的复杂环境，并揭开《哈里斯大道上的善举》所蕴含的深意。

items.title: Swordsmith of Greyhaven Demo
items.short_description: Run a weaponsmith shop in dark medieval city of Greyhaven. Sell weapons, manage gold, debt, materials, and fame, while customers, beggars, bandits, and rumors reveal the consequences of every choice.

items.title: HAECHE_Ism_Demo
items.short_description: In the demo, you'll slash, pierce, and parry your way through swarms of infected machines across an 8-directional grid

items.title: Destruction of Heavenly Bliss
items.short_description: A roguelite shoot 'em up with an oldschool aesthetic and an intense gameplay loop. Fight through 9 levels of a grueling training simulation, growing stronger with every loop, and realize ignorance truly is bliss.

items.title: The End of the World Club Demo
items.short_description: A cute coming-of-age boys' love (BL/yaoi) visual novel set in 2012 about a group of high school students who start a club to prepare for the end of the world.

items.title: Whispers of the Requiem Demo
items.short_description: Step into the mind of a disgraced ex-cop, once a servant of a powerful cult that controls society from the shadows. Now hunted, betrayed, and haunted by sins too dark to name, you must hide the truth before it devours you.

items.title: Late for School
items.short_description: A mashup of Crazy Taxi–style arcade chaos and bus-driving simulation, wrapped in a pixel-art Saturday morning cartoon vibe.

items.title: 1B1E
items.short_description: Welcome to the city where the sun went out forever. Only rain, darkness, and an endless stream of corpses.

items.title: War of the Austrian Succession Demo
items.short_description: Fight across Europe during the War of the Austrian Succession in a tactical wargame of dynastic conflict, continental campaigns, cavalry charges, and rebellions. Command Austrian, Prussian, French, British, Bavarian, Spanish, Sardinian, Jacobite and allied forces across 85 scenarios and 3 campaigns.

items.title: Strike On
items.short_description: Fast-paced multiplayer dodgeball built for pure competitive action. Master precise throws, dodge incoming attacks, and dominate the arena through skill, timing, and movement. Easy to pick up, hard to master — every match is intense, strategic, and action-packed.

items.title: BURI Demo
items.short_description: A story-driven choice-based game where every decision shapes the outcome. Follow Pluem, a boy facing pressure, family expectations, and bullying, with multiple endings determined by your choices.

items.title: Tales Beyond The Tomb - No Witnesses
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 62 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
items.short_description: A psychological horror anthology inspired by disturbing real-life cases. In No Witnesses, a simple road trip turns into a brutal fight for survival when two sisters cross paths with a ruthless serial killer stalking the highways at night.

items.title: Coiled Silence Demo
items.short_description: Coiled Silence is a psychological horror demo about a night shift that starts ordinary and turns wrong. Work the restaurant, manage orders from your phone, and survive the atmosphere as messages and details stop lining up.

items.title: Chopping Together🌲
items.short_description: 一款支持1–4人合作的游戏，你被困在森林中，目标是砍倒所有树木。

items.title: Awkward Night
items.short_description: A cyberpunk noir point-and-click. One bar, one bad night, one drink that proves something. Mix the impossible cocktail. Trade favours. Step out into the rain and meet the stranger waiting under the COCKTAILS sign. Episode 1 of an ongoing indie narrative experiment.

items.title: Harlequinade Demo
items.short_description: Harlequinade is a horror otome romance visual novel about a never-ending carnival and a very death-prone college student. With the aid of 2 clowns, can you escape this timeloop?

items.title: Howl Of Heavens Demo
items.short_description: Howl of Heavens 是即時戰術策略遊戲，講述一名年輕少尉接任野戰總部指揮官的故事。成功實現戰略目標以及整個軍事行動的結果皆取決於你！

items.title: Hunters In The Dark
items.short_description: 黑暗中，宝藏就在眼前！紧张刺激的派对追逐游戏，支持一至四名玩家。每位玩家可以自由选择扮演追逐宝藏的寻宝猎人，或者狩猎其他猎人的暗影猎人。时间紧迫，每局地图随机生成。只有跑得快、躲得准、充分利用道具，才能成为真正的猎人！

items.title: BeaconBound
items.short_description: Collect 15 glowing beacons in a living procedural world. Unlock boost, shield, and stasis to outsmart guardians that adapt as you progress, while weather and terrain reshape every run.

items.title: TD Run: Survivors
items.short_description: Battle through hordes of foes in this roguelike blend of survivors, bullet hell, and tower defense. Conquering TD Run will require more than simple survivor-esque DPS checks. Determine optimal character and weapon specific builds and employ real-time tactics to stay ahead of the increasing enemies.

items.title: The Labyrinth on Burrow Hill
items.short_description: Unravel a thread of riddles and mystery as you progress your way through the atmospheric halls of a dazzlingly large, long-deserted labyrinth. Explore the vistas of spectacular rooms and the hidden challenges within. Do you have what it takes to find what lies at the labyrinth's centre?

items.title: 100 Madagascar Cats
items.short_description: 🐾 加入充满猫咪的主题地点，展开最可爱的冒险！ 😻 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱猫咪。 🐈🕵️‍♂️ 你能找到它们全部吗？ 🕵️‍♂️🐈

items.title: Moon River
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 67 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。
items.short_description: Moon River is a short RPG adventure with an emphasis on music and atmosphere. Perhaps some secrets too... Explore the remains of an quiet, empty world & find the river's end.

items.title: Armor of God
items.short_description: A 2D pixel-art platformer where you choose which armor to wear. Full armor makes you invincible - anyone can win. Leave some behind and the game becomes a very different challenge.

items.title: What You Didn't See
items.short_description: Explore shifting places, uncover lost memories, and escape the creatures that look after you. A psychological horror game about guilt, loss, and the haunting silence of unspoken truths.

items.title: ComboChain Pulse
items.short_description: Survive relentless waves in a fast-paced top-down bullet hell shooter. Chain combos, dodge chaos, and master skill-based combat where every second matters.

items.title: SYSCALL: RING ZERO Demo
items.short_description: Reverse-engineer a private 1990s BBS. Read disassembly, patch broken checks, optimize a nine-core rack, and write assembly firmware that locks onto live scope traces. With 200+ puzzles, full controller support and offline play, you can refine your assembly skills on all your devices!

items.title: Monster Hub
items.short_description: 是一款温馨的开放世界冒险游戏。寻找传送门并深入地下遗迹搜刮稀有宝物，打造你的专属营地，投入珍贵资源并在孵化器中培育出独特的战斗伙伴。如果想找点乐子，你还可以在任何地方建造大炮，将炮弹、你的怪物甚至你自己发射上天！

items.title: 人工魔法言語体系
items.short_description: Create your own spells and play the content!

items.title: Cricket Captain 2026 Demo
items.short_description: Build your dream team with Cricket Captain 2026. Forty-five new playable domestic teams across Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Ireland, Sri Lanka and Zimbabwe, plus match engine and 3D highlights improvements, editor customisation, and faster gameplay throughout.

items.title: Chief of the Valley Demo
items.short_description: Build a PC company from a one-person operation in the dawn of computing to an industry titan in the modern era. Manage staff, secure contracts, research technology, and ship products all while keeping yourself from financial ruin. The Valley is an unforgiving place.

items.title: Monologin
items.short_description: 在这部关于逃避现实与被时代抛下的短篇心理惊悚视觉小说中，一名迷失方向的夜班店员死死抓住一款濒临消亡的 MMORPG、一只传说中的白色独角兽坐骑，以及“老游戏才更‘真实’”的信念不放。

items.title: Monologin Demo
items.short_description: 《Monologin》试玩版短篇，以氛围感与不安为核心……值守深夜便利店，登录一款濒临消亡的 MMORPG，在旧友来来往往间，等待白色独角兽活动的到来。

items.title: Backrooms: Splatter Demo
items.short_description: The Backrooms got colorful. Suit up, grab your paint, and splatter your way out of the liminal void with up to 4 friends.

items.title: Cook & Click
items.short_description: A culinary management clicker game where you chop ingredients, unlock new categories, and open new locations. Automate your production, purchase upgrades to boost profits, unlock special abilities, and compete for challenging achievements. An addictive, endless progression experience.

items.title: Last Shop
items.short_description: A compact sci-fi experience where you manage a spaceship shop through a terminal interface.

items.title: Just a Little Longer
items.short_description: Just a Little Longer is a punishing top-down shooter with the staples of classic action horror games, with a brutal permadeath gambling twist: whenever you die in the recurring nightmare the game takes place in, your save file is instantly deleted.

items.title: MAK: Survival
items.short_description: Survive and evolve in the open world of Oratius. Build, craft, fight creatures, explore hidden locations, ride mounts, and progress from the stone age to modern tech — alone or with friends. Create worlds, complete quests, and uncover the secrets of Mak Survival.

items.title: Body Pillow Royal Demo
items.short_description: 后现代时代中不断被鼓励的死亡螺旋中浪漫排挤的竞争性讽刺。2-4人在线/本地分屏。黑色幽默。

items.title: Tarot Spell
items.short_description: 快节奏的打字生存游戏，通过学习塔罗牌并结合其含义，创造出强大的法术。

items.title: Max's Jungle Odyssey
items.short_description: Enjoy a 2D platforming adventure with 3D graphics starring Max, a brave cat. Experience over 30 levels and an exciting storyline in single-player or local multiplayer. What are you waiting for? The Kikis won't save themselves! Controller is required for local multiplayer.

items.title: The Man Behind the Trigger
items.short_description: Action-platform game set in the mid-2000s. Take vengeance upon six key figures of the entertainment industry for morally bankrupt the society you once loved.

items.title: Market Simulator: Miami Beach
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 36 篇用户评测中有 47% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在阳光明媚的迈阿密海滩从零开始建立你的超市帝国！游戏初期你只能睡在简陋的街头帐篷里，你需要亲自驾驶车辆前往批发商处提取货物，并将商品一件件亲手摆上货架，体验最真实的补货过程。在这个充满挑战的残酷街头经济中努力生存下来，组建家庭并让你的家人在街头帮你赚取额外现金以维持资金流转。在这个极其逼真的商业管理与生活模拟游戏中，通过精明的策略不断扩大你的零售业务，最终成功掌控并运营两家繁华的超市门店。

items.title: Maseylia : Echoes of the Past
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 22 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
items.short_description: 探索神秘奇幻的世界！Maseylia: Echoes of the Past是一款3D类银河恶魔城游戏。解锁独特技能，发现隐藏路径，掌握流畅移动。面对野生生物，揭开广阔互联世界的秘密。

items.title: Floyd's Cafe Demo
items.short_description: Floyd's Cafe is an upcoming cute cozy cat cafe game where you can make anything from black tea to Moka pot coffee or even just use a coffee machine. Decorate the Cafe to perfection with flowers, shelfs, and even cacti.

items.title: Tales of the Trade Demo
items.short_description: 在一个奇幻世界里，开一家属于你的中世纪小店吧。进货、摆货、应付各种离谱顾客，还要处理那些“多少带点魔法问题”的商品。顺便……也就顺便慢慢还清你祖父留下的 99,999,999,980 金币债务。

items.title: Querent Demo
items.short_description: Rally the small town of Sunset Junction to survive hypnotic creatures in a post-apocalyptic desert landscape. Boost skills by building a deck for each of your characters. Use mesmerism to solve puzzles and build relationships with the people you meet. Play your cards right and you might survive!

items.title: 外婆的手账本 Demo
items.short_description: 《外婆的手账本》是一款温暖治愈的情感叙事+烹饪模拟游戏。翻开外婆留下的手账本，在一段段与外婆一起做饭的美好回忆中重走成长之路。那些曾被忽略的日常，终将拼凑出一个你从未真正了解过的她。

items.title: OPEN GUARD
items.short_description: The first Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu gym management simulation. Build an academy, sign fighters, develop them through the belt ranks, and compete from local opens to world championships. Every save tells a different story.

items.title: Taktari
items.short_description: Taktari is a turn-based auto-battle game where both player and enemies queue up their actions prior to battle. Press play and let the actions play out in this African Inspired Fantasy deck building game.

items.title: Water Truck Simulator
items.short_description: Drive a heavy water tanker fill your tank travel through city roads and off-road routes and deliver water safely across challenging missions in Water Truck Simulator. Test your driving skills as you control a mini water tanker truck through traffic.

items.title: Morph Browser
items.short_description: 瀏覽器本身，就是你的操作對象。 Morph Browser 是一款桌面益智遊戲，你只需要一顆滑鼠，操控瀏覽器視窗，將球引導至目標。 遊戲的舞台是整個螢幕。移動視窗位置或調整大小來引導物理運算的球——規則雖然簡單，背後卻有多個截然不同的關卡在等待著你。 隨著關卡推進，所要求的操作也會不斷改變。 你的螢幕，就是遊戲場。 不需要任何特殊控制器，只需要滑鼠。 但你平日慣用的視窗操作與 OS 設定，將直接決定你能否過關。

items.title: TEAM PANIC
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 46 篇用户评测中有 56% 为好评。
items.short_description: TEAM PANIC 是一款电影化的合作冒险游戏，两名玩家将一起解开谜题，通过团队合作推进游戏，并体验充满乐趣的时刻。

items.title: Dino Pet Walker
items.short_description: Dino Pet Walker is a Fantasy Casual Game where you realize your childhood dream and play with your dinosaur pet. On this adventure, be ready for solve puzzles and have fun with your and another dino's in a voxel art enviroment, inspired by brazillians biomes.

items.title: Promo Wrestling World
items.short_description: Book the cards, manage the roster, build champions, and survive a living wrestling industry where rival promotions sign talent, run shows, grow, fold, and reshape the world around your dynasty over years of play.

items.title: Power and Glory
items.short_description: Power & Glory is a fast-paced 2D action fantasy RPG where you rise from an outsider to power. Choose your origin, fight through dangerous dungeons, loot powerful items, gain skills, shape your build, and make choices that define your path and faction influence.

items.title: FIRE The First Dreamer
items.short_description: 探索古老秘密，召唤图腾之力，解读神秘讯息，在这款基于真实故事的开放世界冒险中踏入威尔士普雷塞利群山。踏上旅程，重寻有意义的人生之道。

items.title: Dave.EXE
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 22 篇用户评测中有 86% 为好评。
items.short_description: Time travel and explore different worlds to save the universe from the evil overlord, Edgy Dave. Empty vending machines of their soda, go on various errands and evade E.D's goons as you desperately run for your life in this goofy comedy horror game!

items.title: Monster Rush Survivors
items.short_description: 在《Monster Rush Survivors》中对抗无尽的敌人浪潮，这是一款节奏快速的Roguelite生存游戏，拥有疯狂的构筑！组合装备、强化技能、解锁角色，在这个充满协同效果的高强度弹幕天堂中消灭成千上万的敌人。

items.title: It's Hunting Time
items.short_description: Hunting season is open! It's time to make some money as you roam the unexplored expanses of the empire.

items.title: Zyntaris
items.short_description: 一款支持合作模式的类Roguelike生存游戏。独自或与好友一起消灭成千上万的敌人。解锁拥有独特能力的新英雄。收集稀有武器和魔法书，将它们组合起来，发现疯狂的联动效果！

items.title: Cluemates Demo
items.short_description: A co-op puzzle game where you and your friends explore maps, search for clues, and try to crack a hidden color sequence. Half the clues are fake. All of your friends will be wrong. Good luck.

items.title: Peko Downhill Hurl
items.short_description: Control a ball rolling under gravity and momentum. You can steer it a little - but once the inertia builds up, staying in control becomes the real challenge.

items.title: Political Debate
items.short_description: Debate against leftists. Create your own debates and NPCs, and share them with your friends. The game includes tools to make the creation of user content easier.

items.title: Super Sub: World Cup
items.short_description: Win the world cup through clever clicks, useful upgrades, silly own goals, and bending the rules. An active incremental game that strips football down to just its beautiful beating heart: kick balls hard, score goals, earn money.

potential_items.title: FISH
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 84 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: FISH is a Platformer Run & Gun Shooter where you play as an armed FISH violently exploring through multiple levels. The game features a funny, unique stylized artstyle that could get a chuckle out of you!

potential_items.title: Plant Nursery Simulator
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 264 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在这款轻松模拟游戏中经营温馨的植物苗圃。种植作物，补充货架，服务顾客。扩建温室，雇佣员工，装饰梦想店铺。适合喜欢治愈农场和模拟游戏的玩家。

potential_items.title: SAND: Raiders of Sophie
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 789 篇用户评测中有 60% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在架空的1910年，驾驶巨型“践踏者”穿越索菲的沙海展开搜刮。建造你高度可自定义的步行基地，单人或组队行动，收集战利品、武器与珍贵遗物。在历史与混乱锻造的程序生成荒漠中，与其他玩家激烈交锋。

potential_items.title: 圣火守望者：共筑防线
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 108 篇用户评测中有 53% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 迎击铺天盖地的敌潮，筑起钢铁防线！在《圣火守望者：共筑防线》满屏怪物的围攻下，一边疯狂输出，一边即时建造塔楼、围墙与防御设施。搜刮随机神器，强化武器与英雄配置，死守竞技场中央的信标——只要信标未灭，战斗永不停歇！支持单人游玩，亦可2-4人热血联机。

potential_items.title: 疯狂轮盘 / Bingle Bingle
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 582 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 《疯狂轮盘》是一款超带劲的 “轮盘构筑” 策略游戏！在这里，你可以DIY专属自己的轮盘，把各种小球、筹码分配、代币、槽位和徽章玩转组合，触发让人肾上腺素狂飙的超强Buff！狠狠赚它个几百万、几千万筹码，赢下这场赌场对决吧！

potential_items.title: 梦想翻新家
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 137 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 给你一间旧屋，把它打造成梦想中的小家吧！拾起杂物、清理污渍、布置房间。这里是你专属的安全屋，没有既定规则和目标，一切都随你心意。把烦恼像垃圾一样丢掉，把坏心情像污渍一样擦去，让你的心灵和小屋一起焕然一新！准备好迎接你的新家了吗？一、二、三——欢迎回家！

potential_items.title: Idle Startup
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 109 篇用户评测中有 44% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Build a tech company from a one-person garage into a global empire. Train six skills, complete their upgrade trees, chase milestone bonuses, and unlock new departments in this clean, addictive incremental idle game — progress keeps rolling even while you're away.

potential_items.title: Skillwood
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 205 篇用户评测中有 92% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Skillwood is a relaxing woodcutter simulator inspired by survival simulators and incremental games. Chop wood, mine stone, trade with NPCs, upgrade forests, unlock new trees or new areas and prestige to do even better next run.

potential_items.title: 海边宝藏小铺
